---
title: "Pangenome compendia and models"
output: powerpoint_presentation
date: "2025-07-03"
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  dev = "png",
  dpi = 300,
  fig.width = 5,
  fig.height = 4
)
```

```{r, warning=F, message=F, include=F}
library(librarian)
shelf(KEGGREST, 
      EnrichmentBrowser,
      ComplexHeatmap,
      circlize,
      RColorBrewer,
      DESeq2,
      dplyr,
      corrplot,
      ggplot2,
      stringr,
      readr,
      ggprism,
      reshape2,
      ggpubr,
      WGCNA,
      ica,
      gmodels)
#library(KEGGREST)
#library(EnrichmentBrowser)
#library(ComplexHeatmap)
#library(circlize)
#library(RColorBrewer)
#library(DESeq2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(corrplot)
#library(ggplot2)
```



## Load data

```{r}
comp_files_all <- list.files('./compendia/', pattern = "*_log_counts_norm_01.csv")
comp_files <- comp_files_all[-c(17,20)]
comp_files <- comp_files_all[c(1,17,21)]
comp_dfs <-lapply(comp_files, function(x){
  c <- read.csv(paste0("./compendia/",x), stringsAsFactors = F)
  c$X <- paste0("Feature:",c$X)
  c[is.na(c)] <- 0
  c
})

names(comp_dfs) <- str_extract(comp_files, "([a-zA-Z_]+)(_log_counts_norm_01.csv)", group = 1)

t <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  print(dim(m))
  head(m[,1], n=10)
})
```

## Load DAE models

```{r}

dae_files_all <- list.files('../outputs/weights/', pattern = "saur_pan_genome_BLAST_trimmed_log_counts_norm_01pi_pan_genome_log_counts_norm_01_seed:571*")
dae_files <- dae_files_all[str_detect(dae_files_all, "ep:50") & str_detect(dae_files_all, "act:relu")]
dae_files <- dae_files[c(1,3)]
dae_dfs <-lapply(dae_files, function(x){
  c <- read.csv(paste0("../outputs/weights/",x), stringsAsFactors = F,
                         header = F)
  #rownames(c) <- paste0("Feature:",comp_dfs[["sepi_pan_genome"]]$X)
  rownames(c) <- comp_dfs[["sepi_pan_genome"]]$X
  c[is.na(c)] <- 0
  c
})

names(dae_dfs) <- paste(paste(str_extract(dae_files, "(prew:_)([prepostFTP]*)(_en_weights_da.csv)", group = 2),
                        str_extract(dae_files, "(kl1:[01])", group = 1), sep = "_"),
                        str_extract(dae_files, "(init:glorot_)([normaluniform]*)", group = 2), sep = "_")

t <- lapply(names(dae_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- dae_dfs[[x]]
  print(dim(m))
  #head(m[,2], n=10)
})




```


## PCA

```{r}

comp_pca <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  print(dim(m))
  i <- prcomp(t(m[,-1]), rank. = 50)
  i
})
names(comp_pca) <- names(comp_dfs)

```


```{r}

comp_pca350 <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  print(dim(m))
  i <- prcomp(t(m[,-1]), rank. = 350)
  i
})
names(comp_pca350) <- names(comp_dfs)

```


## ICA

```{r}

comp_ica <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  print(dim(m))
  i <- ica(t(m[,-1]),50)
  i
})
names(comp_ica) <- names(comp_dfs)

```



## ICA

```{r}

comp_ica350 <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  print(dim(m))
  i <- ica(t(m[,-1]),350)
  i
})
names(comp_ica350) <- names(comp_dfs)

```

## Compendium corrs

```{r}


comp_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  r <- m[,-1]
  print(dim(r))
  i <- cor(t(r))
  i
})


names(comp_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)

```


## PCA corrs

```{r}


comp_pca_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_pca[[x]]
  r <- m$rotation
  print(dim(r))
  i <- cor(t(r))
  i
})

names(comp_pca_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)

```




```{r}


comp_pca350_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_pca350[[x]]
  r <- m$rotation
  print(dim(r))
  i <- cor(t(r))
  i
})

names(comp_pca350_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)

```

## ICA corrs

```{r}


comp_ica_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_ica[[x]]
  r <- m$M
  print(dim(r))
  i <- cor(t(r))
  i
})

names(comp_ica_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)

```



```{r}


comp_ica350_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- comp_ica350[[x]]
  r <- m$M
  print(dim(r))
  i <- cor(t(r))
  i
})

names(comp_ica350_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)

```

## DAE corrs

```{r}


dae_corrs <- lapply(names(dae_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  m <- dae_dfs[[x]]
  r <- m
  print(dim(r))
  i <- cor(t(r))
  i
})

names(dae_corrs) <- names(dae_dfs)

```


## Load operons


```{r}
operons <- read.csv('conserved_operon.download.txt', sep='\t', stringsAsFactors = F)
se_opes <- operons[operons$org == '176280',]
sa_opes <- operons[operons$org == '93061',]
```


## Gene IDs

```{r}
epi_gpa <- read.csv("sepi_out_1707234787/gene_presence_absence.csv", stringsAsFactors = F)
epi_gpa$species <- "Sepi"
epi_gpa$hyp <- sapply(epi_gpa$Annotation, function(x) if( x == "hypothetical protein"){"hypothetical protein"}else{"characterized (named)"})

epi_gpa$compound_name <- apply(epi_gpa[,c(15:20)], 1, FUN = function(x) paste(x, collapse  = " ") )
epi_gpa$first_name <- sapply(epi_gpa$compound_name, function(x) str_extract(x, "[0-9a-zA-Z_]+"))

aur_gpa <- read.csv("saur_out_1707260617/gene_presence_absence.csv", stringsAsFactors = F)
aur_gpa$species <- "Saur"
aur_gpa$hyp <- sapply(aur_gpa$Annotation, function(x) if( x == "hypothetical protein"){"hypothetical protein"}else{"characterized (named)"})

aur_gpa$compound_name <- apply(aur_gpa[,c(15:32)], 1, FUN = function(x) paste(x, collapse  = " ") )
aur_gpa$first_name <- sapply(aur_gpa$compound_name, function(x) str_extract(x, "[0-9a-zA-Z_]+"))
```


### Read in strain data

```{r}
strain_list <- read.csv('strain_names.csv')

epi_gff <- lapply(list.files("sepi_out_1707234787/fixed_input_files/", "*.gff",full.names = T),
                  function(x) read.csv(x,skip = 9, header = F, sep = '\t'))

names(epi_gff) <- str_extract(list.files("sepi_out_1707234787/fixed_input_files/", "*.gff"),"([A-Za-z0-9_.]*)(.gff)", group=1)

epi_op_strain <- epi_gff[['GCF_000007645.1']]
epi_op_strain$ID <- str_extract(epi_op_strain$V9, "(ID=)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
epi_op_strain$operon_loci <- str_extract(epi_op_strain$V9, "(old_locus_tag=)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
epi_op_strain$new_locus_tag <- str_extract(epi_op_strain$V9, "(locus_tag=)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)

loci_map <- epi_op_strain[,c('operon_loci','new_locus_tag')]
loci_map <- loci_map[!is.na(loci_map$operon_loci),]
rownames(loci_map) <- loci_map$new_locus_tag

epi_op_strain$operon_loci_2 <- loci_map[epi_op_strain$new_locus_tag, "operon_loci"]
epi_op_strain$ID[is.na(epi_op_strain$ID)] <- " "
rownames(epi_op_strain) <- make.unique(epi_op_strain$ID)
epi_gpa$operon_loci <- epi_op_strain[epi_gpa$GCF_000007645.1, "operon_loci_2"]



aur_gff <- lapply(list.files("saur_out_1707260617/fixed_input_files/", "*.gff",full.names = T),
                  function(x) read.csv(x,skip = 9, header = F, sep = '\t'))

names(aur_gff) <- str_extract(list.files("saur_out_1707260617/fixed_input_files/", "*.gff"),"([A-Za-z0-9_.]*)(.gff)", group=1)

aur_op_strain <- aur_gff[['GCF_000013425.1']]
aur_op_strain$ID <- str_extract(aur_op_strain$V9, "(ID=)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\\.1)", group = 2)
aur_op_strain$operon_loci <- str_extract(aur_op_strain$V9, "(Parent=gene-)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
aur_op_strain$new_locus_tag <- str_extract(aur_op_strain$V9, "(locus_tag=)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)

loci_map <- aur_op_strain[,c('operon_loci','ID')]
loci_map <- loci_map[!is.na(loci_map$operon_loci),]
loci_map$ID[is.na(loci_map$ID)] <- " "
rownames(loci_map) <- make.unique(loci_map$ID)

aur_gpa$operon_loci <- loci_map[aur_gpa$GCF_000013425.1, "operon_loci"]


```



## Operons by gene ID

```{r}
se_opes_split <- sapply(se_opes$op, function(x) str_split(x, ","))
se_opes_split <- se_opes_split[sapply(se_opes_split, function(x) length(x)) > 1]
se_opes_first_name <- lapply(se_opes_split, function(x) epi_gpa$first_name[epi_gpa$operon_loci %in% x])

sa_opes_split <- sapply(sa_opes$op, function(x) str_split(x, ","))
sa_opes_split <- sa_opes_split[sapply(sa_opes_split, function(x) length(x)) > 1]
sa_opes_first_name <- lapply(sa_opes_split, function(x) aur_gpa$first_name[aur_gpa$operon_loci %in% x])
```


## Operon mapping


```{r}
se_opes_first_name_f <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(x) paste0("Feature:",x))
sa_opes_first_name_f <- lapply(sa_opes_first_name, function(x) paste0("Feature:",x))

table(sapply(se_opes_first_name_f, function(x) length(x)))

table(sapply(se_opes_first_name_f, function(x) sum(x %in% comp_dfs[[1]]$X)))

table(sapply(se_opes_first_name_f, function(x) sum(x %in% rownames(dae_dfs[[1]]))))
```

## Write out operons

```{r}
se_opes_first_name_f_flat <- sapply(se_opes_first_name_f,
                                     function(x) paste(x, 
                                                       collapse = ';'))

se_opes_f_df <- data.frame(
  'OperonID' = names(se_opes_first_name_f),
  'Length' = sapply(se_opes_first_name_f,function(x) length(x)),
  'Genes' = se_opes_first_name_f_flat
)

se_opes_f_df_filt <- se_opes_f_df[se_opes_f_df$Length > 0,]

write_delim(se_opes_f_df_filt,
          'sepi_pan_operonF_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
```

```{r}
se_opes_first_name_flat <- sapply(se_opes_first_name,
                                     function(x) paste(x, 
                                                       collapse = ';'))

se_opes_df <- data.frame(
  'OperonID' = names(se_opes_first_name),
  'Length' = sapply(se_opes_first_name,function(x) length(x)),
  'Genes' = se_opes_first_name_flat
)

se_opes_df_filt <- se_opes_df[se_opes_df$Length > 0,]

write_delim(se_opes_df_filt,
          'sepi_pan_operon_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
```



```{r}
sa_opes_first_name_f_flat <- sapply(sa_opes_first_name_f,
                                     function(x) paste(x, 
                                                       collapse = ';'))

sa_opes_f_df <- data.frame(
  'OperonID' = names(sa_opes_first_name_f),
  'Length' = sapply(sa_opes_first_name_f,function(x) length(x)),
  'Genes' = sa_opes_first_name_f_flat
)

sa_opes_f_df_filt <- sa_opes_f_df[sa_opes_f_df$Length > 0,]

write_delim(sa_opes_f_df_filt,
          'saur_pan_operonF_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
```


```{r}
sa_opes_first_name_flat <- sapply(sa_opes_first_name,
                                     function(x) paste(x, 
                                                       collapse = ';'))

sa_opes_df <- data.frame(
  'OperonID' = names(sa_opes_first_name),
  'Length' = sapply(sa_opes_first_name,function(x) length(x)),
  'Genes' = sa_opes_first_name_flat
)

sa_opes_df_filt <- sa_opes_df[sa_opes_df$Length > 0,]

write_delim(sa_opes_df_filt,
          'saur_pan_operon_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
```


## Operon correlations

```{r}
se_operon_pca_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_pca_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names])
  })
  by_op
})
names(se_operon_pca_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```



```{r}
se_operon_pca350_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_pca350_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names])
  })
  by_op
})
names(se_operon_pca350_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```



```{r}
se_operon_comp_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    #print(op_names)
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names], na.rm=T)
  })
  by_op
})
names(se_operon_comp_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```

```{r}
sa_operon_comp_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(sa_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names], na.rm=T)
  })
  by_op
})
names(sa_operon_comp_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```


```{r}
sa_operon_pca_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_pca_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(sa_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names])
  })
  by_op
})
names(sa_operon_pca_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```


```{r}
sa_operon_ica_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_ica_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(sa_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names])
  })
  by_op
})
names(sa_operon_ica_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```


```{r}
se_operon_ica_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_ica_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names])
  })
  by_op
})
names(se_operon_ica_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```


```{r}
se_operon_ica350_corrs <- lapply(names(comp_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- comp_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(c$X, "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- comp_ica350_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names])
  })
  by_op
})
names(se_operon_ica350_corrs) <- names(comp_dfs)
```


```{r}
se_operon_dae_corrs <- lapply(names(dae_dfs), function(x){
  print(x)
  c <- dae_dfs[[x]]
  rnames <- str_extract(rownames(c), "(Feature:)([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)", group = 2)
  pca_cs <- dae_corrs[[x]]
  colnames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  rownames(pca_cs) <- rnames
  by_op <- lapply(se_opes_first_name, function(y){
    op_names <- rnames[rnames %in% y]
    median(pca_cs[op_names, op_names], na.rm=T)
  })
  by_op
})
names(se_operon_dae_corrs) <- names(dae_dfs)
```

```{r}
se_operon_pca_corrs_df <- data.frame(lapply(se_operon_pca_corrs, function(x) unlist(x)))
se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m <- melt(se_operon_pca_corrs_df)
se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m$red_dum <- "PCA"
se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m$species_opeon <- "Se"

se_operon_ica_corrs_df <- data.frame(lapply(se_operon_ica_corrs, function(x) unlist(x)))
se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m <- melt(se_operon_ica_corrs_df)
se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m$red_dum <- "ICA"
se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m$species_opeon <- "Se"


se_operon_pca350_corrs_df <- data.frame(lapply(se_operon_pca350_corrs, function(x) unlist(x)))
se_operon_pca350_corrs_df_m <- melt(se_operon_pca350_corrs_df)
se_operon_pca350_corrs_df_m$red_dum <- "PCA350"
se_operon_pca350_corrs_df_m$species_opeon <- "Se"

se_operon_ica350_corrs_df <- data.frame(lapply(se_operon_ica350_corrs, function(x) unlist(x)))
se_operon_ica350_corrs_df_m <- melt(se_operon_ica350_corrs_df)
se_operon_ica350_corrs_df_m$red_dum <- "ICA350"
se_operon_ica350_corrs_df_m$species_opeon <- "Se"


se_operon_dae_corrs_df <- data.frame(lapply(se_operon_dae_corrs, function(x) unlist(x)))
se_operon_dae_corrs_df_m <- melt(se_operon_dae_corrs_df)
se_operon_dae_corrs_df_m$red_dum <- "DAE"
se_operon_dae_corrs_df_m$species_opeon <- "Se"






se_operon_comp_corrs_df <- data.frame(lapply(se_operon_comp_corrs, function(x) unlist(x)))
se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m <- melt(se_operon_comp_corrs_df)
se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m$red_dum <- "COMP"
se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m$species_opeon <- "Se"


se_operon_corrs_df_m <- rbind(rbind(rbind(se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m,se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m),
                              se_operon_dae_corrs_df_m),
                              se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m)
                              
```


```{r,, fig.width=12, fig.height = 10 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp <- se_operon_corrs_df_m

variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = names(sort(variable_order)))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value, color = red_dum)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

#ggsave("plots/pca_op_corrs.png")
```




```{r,, fig.width=12, fig.height = 10 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_pca350_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_pca350_corrs_df_m$value),]

variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = names(sort(variable_order)))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

#ggsave("plots/pca350_op_corrs.png")
```





```{r,, fig.width=12, fig.height = 10 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m$value),]

variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = names(sort(variable_order)))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

#ggsave("plots/ica_op_corrs.png")
```



```{r,, fig.width=12, fig.height = 10 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_ica350_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_ica350_corrs_df_m$value),]

variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = names(sort(variable_order)))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

#ggsave("plots/ica350_op_corrs.png")
```



```{r,, fig.width=12, fig.height = 10 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_dae_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_dae_corrs_df_m$value),]

variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = names(sort(variable_order)))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

#ggsave("plots/compendia_op_corrs.png")
```



```{r,, fig.width=12, fig.height = 10 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m$value),]

variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = names(sort(variable_order)))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

ggsave("plots/compendia_op_corrs.png")
```




## select


```{r,, fig.width=8, fig.height = 8 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp <- plot_temp[plot_temp$variable %in% c('sepi_pan_genome_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 'sepi_pan_genome_RAND_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_'
                                                 ),]
variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = c('sepi_pan_genome_RAND_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_', 'sepi_pan_genome_'
                                                 ))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value, color = variable)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3, width = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Spectral", guide = "none") +
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.signif", method = "t.test",
                     ref.group = "sepi_pan_genome_RAND_", label.y = 1.1)  +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

#ggsave("plots/compendia_op_corrs_select.png")
```




```{r,, fig.width=8, fig.height = 8 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp <- plot_temp[plot_temp$variable %in% c('sepi_pan_genome_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 'sepi_pan_genome_RAND_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_'
                                                 ),]
variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = c('sepi_pan_genome_RAND_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_', 'sepi_pan_genome_'
                                                 ))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value, color = variable)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3, width = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Spectral", guide = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.signif", method = "t.test",
                     ref.group = "sepi_pan_genome_RAND_", label.y = 1.1)  +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

ggsave("plots/pca_op_corrs_select.png")
```




```{r,, fig.width=8, fig.height = 8 }
plot_temp <- se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp <- plot_temp[plot_temp$variable %in% c('sepi_pan_genome_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 'sepi_pan_genome_RAND_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_'
                                                 ),]
variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = c('sepi_pan_genome_RAND_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_', 'sepi_pan_genome_'
                                                 ))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value, color = variable)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.3, width = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) + 
  #facet_grid(.~red_dum) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Spectral", guide = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.signif", method = "t.test",
                     ref.group = "sepi_pan_genome_RAND_", label.y = 1.1)  +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

ggsave("plots/ica_op_corrs_select.png")
```


```{r,, fig.width=24, fig.height = 8 }
plot_temp_comp <- se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_comp_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp_comp$method <- "norm_gene_exp"
plot_temp_pca <- se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_pca_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp_pca$method <- "pca"
plot_temp_ica <- se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m[!is.na(se_operon_ica_corrs_df_m$value),]
plot_temp_ica$method <- "ica"


plot_temp <- rbind(rbind(plot_temp_comp, plot_temp_pca, plot_temp_ica))
plot_temp$method <- factor(plot_temp$method, levels = c("norm_gene_exp","pca","ica"))

plot_temp <- plot_temp[plot_temp$variable %in% c('sepi_pan_genome_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 'sepi_pan_genome_RAND_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_'
                                                 ),]
variable_order <- tapply(plot_temp$value, plot_temp$variable, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T))

plot_temp$variable <- factor(plot_temp$variable, levels = c('sepi_pan_genome_RAND_', 'saur_pan_genome_RAND_', 
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_CROSS_RAND_','saur_pan_genome_BLAST_with_rand_',
                                                 'saur_pan_genome_FLDSKEXH_with_rand_', 'sepi_pan_genome_'
                                                 ))

g <- ggplot(plot_temp , aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = method, color = method)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) + 
  facet_grid(.~variable, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.signif", aes(group = method), method = "anova",paired = T,
                      label.y = 1.1)  +
  theme_prism(axis_text_angle = 45)
g

ggsave("plots/combined_op_corrs_select.png")
```


## Download KEGG paths

### KEGG ortholog numbers

Get KEGG pathways in ortholog number format

```{r}
res <- keggList("pathway")

kegg_ko_paths <- sapply(names(res), function(x){
  try(keggLink("ko",x))
} )

sum(sapply(kegg_ko_paths, function(x) length(x) < 2))
rem <- names(kegg_ko_paths)[sapply(kegg_ko_paths, function(x) length(x) < 2)]

kegg_ko_paths2 <- sapply(rem, function(x){
  try(keggLink("ko",x))
} )

sum(sapply(kegg_ko_paths2, function(x) length(x) < 2))
rem <- names(kegg_ko_paths2)[sapply(kegg_ko_paths2, function(x) length(x) < 2)]



```


### Pangenome KO

```{r}
sepi_pan_KO1 <- read.csv('kegg_files/sepi_pan_genome_first_half_blastKOALA_user_ko.txt', sep = '\t', 
                      header=F,
                      stringsAsFactors = F)
sepi_pan_KO2 <- read.csv('kegg_files/sepi_pan_genome_second_half_blastKOALA_user_ko.txt', sep = '\t', 
                      header=F,
                      stringsAsFactors = F)
sepi_pan_KO <- rbind(sepi_pan_KO1,sepi_pan_KO2)

##
saur_pan_KO1 <- read.csv('kegg_files/saur_pan_genome_first_half_blastKOALA_user_ko.txt', sep = '\t', 
                      header=F,
                      stringsAsFactors = F)
saur_pan_KO2 <- read.csv('kegg_files/saur_pan_genome_second_half_blastKOALA_user_ko.txt', sep = '\t', 
                      header=F,
                      stringsAsFactors = F)
saur_pan_KO <- rbind(saur_pan_KO1,saur_pan_KO2)


```


## KO paths


```{r}
sepi_pan_KO_paths <- lapply(kegg_ko_paths, function(x){
  ux <- str_extract(unlist(x), 'K[0-9]*')
  ux[ux %in% sepi_pan_KO$V2]
})

sepi_pan_KO_paths_as_gene <- sapply(sepi_pan_KO_paths, 
                                function(x){
                                  unlist(sapply(unlist(x), function(y){
                                    z=sepi_pan_KO$V1[
                                      sepi_pan_KO$V2 == y]
                                    unlist(z[!is.na(z)])
                                  }))
                                })



sepi_pan_KO_paths_as_gene_flat <- sapply(sepi_pan_KO_paths_as_gene,
                                     function(x) paste(x, 
                                                       collapse = ';'))

##

saur_pan_KO_paths <- lapply(kegg_ko_paths, function(x){
  ux <- str_extract(unlist(x), 'K[0-9]*')
  ux[ux %in% saur_pan_KO$V2]
})

saur_pan_KO_paths_as_gene <- sapply(saur_pan_KO_paths, 
                                function(x){
                                  unlist(sapply(unlist(x), function(y){
                                    z=saur_pan_KO$V1[
                                      saur_pan_KO$V2 == y]
                                    unlist(z[!is.na(z)])
                                  }))
                                })



saur_pan_KO_paths_as_gene_flat <- sapply(saur_pan_KO_paths_as_gene,
                                     function(x) paste(x, 
                                                       collapse = ';'))
```


## KO paths 


```{r}
sepi_pan_kegg_df <- data.frame(
  'KEGGPathID' = paste(names(res), res, sep = ':'),
  'Length' = sapply(sepi_pan_KO_paths,function(x) length(x)),
  'Genes' = sepi_pan_KO_paths_as_gene_flat
)

sepi_pan_kegg_df_filt <- sepi_pan_kegg_df[sepi_pan_kegg_df$Length > 0,]

write_delim(sepi_pan_kegg_df_filt,
          'sepi_pan_KEGG_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
write_delim(sepi_pan_kegg_df_filt,
          '~/Dropbox/Github/seqADAGE/node_interpretation/sepi_pan_KEGG_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')

#

saur_pan_kegg_df <- data.frame(
  'KEGGPathID' = paste(names(res), res, sep = ':'),
  'Length' = sapply(saur_pan_KO_paths,function(x) length(x)),
  'Genes' = saur_pan_KO_paths_as_gene_flat
)

saur_pan_kegg_df_filt <- saur_pan_kegg_df[saur_pan_kegg_df$Length > 0,]

write_delim(saur_pan_kegg_df_filt,
          'saur_pan_KEGG_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
write_delim(saur_pan_kegg_df_filt,
          '~/Dropbox/Github/seqADAGE/node_interpretation/saur_pan_KEGG_format.txt', 
          #row.names = F,
          delim = '\t')
```
